confidence.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
confidence.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: search_stores, get_store · Private data: create_store, create_product, set_price, publish, delete_product · Public sink: publish · Destructive: delete_product.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: search_stores, get_store · Private data: create_store, create_product, set_price, publish, delete_product · Public sink: publish · Destructive: delete_product

confidence.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
